title.en: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation AI model

summary.zh: OpenAI发布了GPT-5.6 Sol预览版，该模型在编程、科学和网络安全方面能力更强，并配备了最先进的安全栈。这标志着大型语言模型的新进展，开发者可以期待更高效的AI工具。
summary.en: OpenAI has previewed GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with enhanced capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, along with its most advanced safety stack. This represents a significant advancement in large language models, offering developers more powerful AI tools.

title.zh: OpenAI与博通联合推出LLM优化推理芯片Jalapeño
title.en: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil Jalapeño, an LLM-optimized inference chip

summary.zh: OpenAI与博通合作推出了Jalapeño芯片，专为大型语言模型推理优化，旨在提升性能、效率和可扩展性。这款定制芯片将帮助加速AI系统的部署和运行。
summary.en: OpenAI and Broadcom have introduced Jalapeño, a custom AI chip optimized for LLM inference, designed to enhance performance, efficiency, and scalability. This chip aims to accelerate the deployment and operation of AI systems.

title.zh: AMD Strix Halo RDMA集群设置指南
title.en: AMD Strix Halo RDMA Cluster Setup Guide

summary.zh: 该指南详细介绍了如何使用AMD Strix Halo设置RDMA集群，适用于AI工作负载的高性能计算。开发者可以学习配置网络和硬件以优化AI模型的推理和训练。
summary.en: This guide provides detailed instructions for setting up RDMA clusters using AMD Strix Halo, targeting high-performance computing for AI workloads. Developers can learn to configure networks and hardware to optimize AI model inference and training.

title.zh: GPT-5助力免疫学家解开三年之谜
title.en: How GPT-5 helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery

summary.zh: GPT-5 Pro协助免疫学家解决了三年未解之谜，提供了对T细胞行为的新见解。这一突破可能推动癌症和自身免疫疾病的研究，展示了AI在科学领域的应用潜力。
summary.en: GPT-5 Pro aided immunologists in solving a 3-year-old mystery, offering new insights into T cell behavior. This breakthrough could advance research in cancer and autoimmune diseases, demonstrating AI's potential in scientific discovery.

title.zh: G7易流发布首款货运穿戴式AI硬件「拍拍豆」
title.en: G7 Flow launches first wearable AI hardware 'Pat Pat Bean' for freight logistics

summary.zh: G7易流推出了货运行业首款穿戴式AI硬件“拍拍豆”，重量仅30克，采用磁吸设计，便于司机佩戴录制。该设备自动同步数据，提升物流交付效率，展示了AI在物联网和物流中的应用。
summary.en: G7 Flow has launched 'Pat Pat Bean', the first wearable AI hardware for the freight industry, weighing only 30g with a magnetic design for easy driver use. It automatically syncs data, improving logistics delivery efficiency, showcasing AI applications in IoT and logistics.

title.zh: 对话张亚勤：AI非泡沫，但AI公司存泡沫
title.en: Interview with Zhang Yaqin: AI is not a bubble, but AI companies have bubbles

summary.zh: 张亚勤院士在访谈中指出，AI技术本身不是泡沫，但当前AI公司存在投资泡沫。他建议更冷静地看待具身智能和AI创业热潮，强调长期价值而非短期炒作。
summary.en: In an interview, Zhang Yaqin states that AI technology itself is not a bubble, but current AI companies face investment bubbles. He advises a more measured approach to embodied intelligence and AI entrepreneurship, emphasizing long-term value over short-term hype.

title.zh: OpenAI应政府要求限制GPT-5.6发布，称限制不应成常态
title.en: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm

summary.zh: OpenAI应政府要求限制了GPT-5.6的发布，但表示此类政府限制不应成为长期默认做法。这引发了关于AI模型部署和政策监管的讨论，对开发者和企业有直接影响。
summary.en: OpenAI has limited the rollout of GPT-5.6 following a government request, but states that such restrictions should not become the long-term default. This raises discussions on AI model deployment and policy regulation, directly impacting developers and enterprises.

title.zh: 纽约时报指控微软为OpenAI构建侵权超级计算机
title.en: NYT slams Microsoft for building copyright-infringing supercomputer for OpenAI

summary.zh: 纽约时报指控微软为OpenAI构建超级计算机，涉嫌侵犯版权。这一事件突显了AI发展中的法律和伦理挑战，特别是在数据使用和知识产权方面。
summary.en: The New York Times has accused Microsoft of building a supercomputer for OpenAI that allegedly infringes copyrights. This highlights legal and ethical challenges in AI development, particularly regarding data use and intellectual property.
